channel.title: OT Risk Management on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in OT Risk Management on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Risk Management
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Risk Management" , "ISA/IEC 62443" , "NERC CIP" , "Risk Assessment" , "Governance" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT risk management for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn risk fundamentals, frameworks like ISA/IEC 62443 and NERC CIP, qualitative and quantitative assessments, risk treatments, governance artifacts, third-party risk, and change management.
